title: cyclosorus supraspinigerus
intro: Cyclosorus supraspinigerus, also known as the Himalayan chain fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health concerns, including arthritis and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Cyclosorus supraspinigerus is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal benefits.
